Patricia Kim.description: continuing work at the government building (conversing about Patricia Kim and Trina Bell conversing about the school festival and charity drive, including event ideas, promotion strategies, and finalizing a proposal to present to Ben Carter) @ the Ville:government_building:meeting room:Town Hall Presenter

Rosie Bell.description: conversing about Mason Bell and Rosie Bell conversing about displaying Rosie's art project in the school hallway, and planning to meet with Ben Carter, their art teacher, and potentially Patricia Kim and other school staff and students to make it a bigger event @ <persona> Mason Bell
chat: Mason Bell
Hey Rosie, I saw you talking about your art project earlier. How's it going? Have you thought more about displaying it in the school hallway like we discussed?
Rosie Bell

Yeah, I've been thinking about it a lot! I really like the idea of displaying it in the school hallway. I was just talking to Trina about it and she thinks it could be a great opportunity to showcase my work. Have you talked to Ben Carter or our art teacher about it yet?
Mason Bell

Not yet, but I was thinking we could talk to them together during lunch tomorrow. I've also been thinking that we could involve the school administration, like Patricia Kim, to make it a bigger event. What do you think?
Rosie Bell

That sounds like a great idea! I'd love to talk to Ben Carter and our art teacher about it tomorrow. And involving Patricia Kim could definitely make it a bigger event. I'm also thinking we could get some feedback from the student council and other art teachers to make it even better.
Mason Bell

That's a great idea to get feedback from the student council and other art teachers. We could also think about inviting Curtis to join our meeting tomorrow, since he's been involved in some of the school's art events before. What time were you thinking of meeting with Ben Carter and our art teacher?
Rosie Bell

How about we meet with Ben Carter and our art teacher at 12:30 pm tomorrow during lunch? That way, we can make sure to catch them before their next class. And yeah, inviting Curtis is a great idea, I'm sure he'd be happy to help us out.
Mason Bell

That sounds like a plan, 12:30 pm tomorrow works for me. I'll make sure to invite Curtis and we can all meet together to discuss the details. Should we also prepare some questions to ask Ben Carter and our art teacher, so we can get the most out of our meeting?
Rosie Bell

Yeah, that's a great idea to prepare some questions. I was thinking we could ask them about the best way to display my art project, and what kind of feedback they think we should be looking for from the student council and other art teachers. We could also ask about the possibility of incorporating it into the school festival and charity drive, like Trina mentioned earlier.
Mason Bell

That sounds like a great plan, I'll make sure to write down some questions for Ben Carter and our art teacher, such as what kind of display materials we'll need and how we can get feedback from the student council. I'll also invite Curtis to join us tomorrow at 12:30 pm. Should we also think about how we're going to present your art project to Patricia Kim and the school administration, to make sure we can get their support for the event?
Rosie Bell

That's a great idea, we should definitely think about how to present my art project to Patricia Kim and the school administration. Maybe we could prepare a short presentation or a proposal that outlines the details of the event and how it will benefit the school. I'll start working on that tonight and we can finalize it tomorrow before our meeting with Ben Carter and our art teacher.
Mason Bell

That sounds like a great idea, preparing a presentation or proposal will definitely help us get Patricia Kim and the school administration on board. I can help you work on it tonight and we can finalize it tomorrow before our meeting. Should we also think about how we're going to involve the student council and other art teachers in the event, maybe we can ask them to help us with the setup or provide some feedback on the display?
Rosie Bell

Yeah, that's a great idea to involve the student council and other art teachers in the event. We could ask them to help us with the setup or provide some feedback on the display. I'll also make sure to include that in the presentation or proposal we're going to prepare for Patricia Kim and the school administration. Let's work on it tonight and finalize it tomorrow before our meeting.
Mason Bell

That sounds like a great plan, I'll help you work on the presentation tonight and we can finalize it tomorrow before our meeting. Should we also think about inviting other students to attend the event and make it a bigger gathering, maybe we can even get some local artists to come and provide feedback on your work?
Rosie Bell

That's a great idea to invite other students and local artists to attend the event, it could definitely make it a bigger and more successful gathering. I'll make sure to include that in the presentation or proposal we're going to prepare for Patricia Kim and the school administration. Let's also think about how we can promote the event to get more people to attend, maybe we can put up posters around the school or send out invitations to the student body.
Mason Bell

That's a great idea to promote the event, we could also use social media to spread the word and get more people to attend. I'll help you design some posters and we can ask the student council to help us distribute them around the school. Should we also think about having a theme for the event or some kind of activities to make it more engaging for the attendees?
Rosie Bell

That's a great idea to have a theme for the event, maybe we could have a theme that ties in with the school festival and charity drive. And for activities, we could have a Q&A session or a workshop where attendees can learn about the inspiration behind my art project. What do you think?
